hero.description: Deart Stil M — official representative of Isolinvest ICF Thermo Block. Our products guarantee exceptional energy efficiency, structural strength and durability for your construction.
products.description: Our ICF (Insulated Concrete Forms) blocks made of expanded polystyrene (EPS) are designed for maximum thermal insulation, structural strength and fast installation.
products.feature.thermal.title: High thermal insulation
products.feature.thermal.description: EPS blocks provide exceptional thermal insulation with a coefficient λ = 0.032 W/mK, significantly reducing heating and cooling costs.
products.feature.fire.title: Fire resistance
products.feature.fire.description: Fire resistance class E according to BDS EN 13501-1. The material is self-extinguishing and does not spread flame.
products.feature.moisture.title: Moisture resistance
products.feature.moisture.description: The closed cell structure prevents moisture absorption, maintaining insulation properties even under extreme conditions.
products.feature.sound.title: Sound insulation
products.feature.sound.description: ICF walls achieve sound insulation up to 50+ dB, ensuring silence and comfort in interior spaces.
products.feature.precision.title: Precise dimensions
products.feature.precision.description: Each block is manufactured with precision up to ±1mm, ensuring easy installation and perfect wall alignment.
products.feature.certification.title: Certifications
products.feature.certification.descripti: Products comply with BDS EN 14933 and carry CE marking, guaranteeing European quality.
products.buildingDescriptionDesktop: With Isolinvest ICF Thermo Block, represented by Deart Stil M, you achieve energy efficiency class A+ and ensure comfort for decades to come.
products.buildingDescriptionMobile: With Isolinvest products, represented by Deart Stil M, you achieve energy efficiency class A+ and ensure comfort for decades to come.
calculator.description: Enter the wall dimensions and get an instant calculation of the ICF blocks needed for your project.
calculator.noteText: includes a 5% reserve for cutting and waste. For a wall width of
calculator.contactForQuote: Contact us for an exact quote for your project.
calculator.emptyHint: Enter the wall length and height to see the result
manufacturing.description: Our modern factory is equipped with the latest technologies for the production of EPS insulation products, ensuring consistently high quality.
manufacturing.step1.title: Raw materials
manufacturing.step1.description: We use high-quality EPS granules from leading European suppliers, guaranteeing consistent quality of the final product.
manufacturing.step2.title: Pre-expansion
manufacturing.step2.description: The granules are expanded to precise density through modern automated systems with digital parameter control.
manufacturing.step3.title: Molding
manufacturing.step3.description: The expanded granules are molded in specialized block molds under controlled pressure and temperature.
manufacturing.step4.title: Quality control
manufacturing.step4.description: Each batch undergoes strict tests for density, dimensions, thermal conductivity and compressive strength.
manufacturing.step5.title: Certification
manufacturing.step5.description: Products receive CE marking and are documented according to the requirements of BDS EN 14933.
manufacturing.step6.title: Delivery
manufacturing.step6.description: We organize fast delivery to the construction site with our own fleet across the country.
products.altProduct1: ICF Thermo Block — top view, three blocks
products.gallerySubtitle: See some of the completed projects with ICF blocks and our warehouse space.
